mapper.select: SELECT r.id AS refresh_token_id, r.token_hash, r.created_at AS refresh_created_at, r.expires_at, r.revoked_at, u.id AS user_id, u.name, u.rel_name, u.mobile, u.gender, u.password, u.email_status, u.email, u.rel_authentication_status, u.id_number, u.address, CASE u.status WHEN 1 THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'DISABLED' END AS status_name, COALESCE(ur.role, 'USER') AS role_name, u.create_time AS user_create_time, u.edit_time AS user_edit_time FROM d_user_refresh_tokens r JOIN d_user u ON u.id = r.user_id LEFT JOIN d_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.id WHERE r.token_hash = #{tokenHash}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO d_user_refresh_tokens (token_hash, user_id, created_at, expires_at, revoked_at) VALUES (#{tokenHash}, #{user.id}, #{createdAt}, #{expiresAt}, #{revokedAt})
